summary: Routiq MVP — multi-tenant SaaS: 25/25 backend tests PASS, full frontend smoke passes. Auth (3 roles via httpOnly cookies), role/tenant isolation, companies CRUD, packages+clients seed, quotation pricing (subtotal/commission/total math), PDF (reportlab valid %PDF, 200 OK), dashboard + master metrics, invite executive, Kanban (6 columns), Landing hero/features/pricing, WhatsApp mock (disabled input present), Mobile drawer button (open-mobile-menu) and responsive layout OK.

issues: No data-testid matches for 'footer' (0 elements); footer block exists visually but lacks test id — minor testability gap

action_items: Optional: add data-testid='landing-footer' (or similar) on the Landing footer element for future automated coverage.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py set_auth_cookies uses secure=True + samesite='none' — correct for cross-origin cookies behind HTTPS preview; OK.
server.py uses @app.on_event('startup') which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers in future iteration (non-blocking).
bcrypt password hashes confirmed ($2b$) via working login flow; seed is idempotent (inserts only when missing) — matches playbook.
CORS: allow_origin_regex='.*' with allow_credentials=True works in Starlette but is non-standard; current browser test confirmed cookies flow. Consider explicit origin list if tightening security.
No brute-force lockout implemented (playbook recommended 5 fails → lock). Not required for MVP but should be tracked.
pricing.py correctly implements subtotal = adult*n_adult + minor*n_minor, commission = subtotal*channel_rate, total = subtotal - commission. Verified numerically in tests.
All Mongo reads use projection {_id:0} — ObjectId never leaks. Good.
seed_data_creation: Seed ran automatically on backend startup: 'Aventúrate por Jalisco' tenant, 2 packages (GDL-TEQ-3N, PV-LUX-5N), 2 clients, 6 demo quotations across kanban states. Test run added: 1 extra quotation (COT-2026007), 1 TEST client, 1 TEST executive user, 1 TEST tenant (slug test-tours-<ts>).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seed is idempotent and runs on every backend startup so demo data is always present. /api/companies test creates additional TEST tenants per run — harmless but accumulates. Master panel metrics card initially takes ~1-2s to populate (axios fetch) so wait_for_timeout>=2000 before asserting numeric content. WhatsApp send input is intentionally disabled until Baileys phase — not a bug.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Previous transient '—' on Master metrics was a screenshot-before-fetch race; confirmed populated (2/2/4/7) on re-check.
